name: Vale S.A.
description: Vale S.A. is a leading global mining company headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. As one of the world's largest producers of iron ore and nickel, the company plays a critical role in the global supply chain for essential industrial materials. Vale also produces manganese, copper, bauxite, and cobalt, which are vital for the ongoing global energy transition. With an extensive network of railroads, ships, and ports, the company integrates its mining operations with logistics to deliver products efficiently worldwide, while maintaining a strong commitment to safety, sustainability, and responsible resource management.
